prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024年最低位次约13276名，2025年约13876名，近两年位次后移约600名，呈逐年小幅下滑趋势；2025年基准位次约13876名；该校在上海市202 4年计划11人，2025年增至12人；2026年计划仍为12人，与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排 名2026年第76名，近年排名稳定在76-77名区间，属于中上水平理工类院校；2022年曾因师德师风事件出现偏负面舆情，但2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉 及学校管理回应；抖音平台热度未进入前100名，整体曝光度一般，未出现明显报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估数据中未单独列出该校，但同源的中国矿业大学 在安全科学与工程（A+）、测绘科学与技术（A-）、土木工程（A-）等学科实力突出，对相关工科专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐 ）、人工智能（谨慎观望）、工商管理类（明显劝退）等专业热度分化明显；上海市2026年考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于北京市，对上海考生属于跨省报考；上海考生规模大幅增长将整体推高各校竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1387 6名、招生计划持平、上海考生总数大幅增长约35%等因素，竞争加剧是主要驱动方向；预计2026年最低位次约14176名，区间13676-14676名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 13276, and in 2025 approximately 13876, with a decline of about 600 positions over the two years, showing a gradual downward trend year by year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13876; the university planned to enroll 11 students in Shanghai in 2024, increased to 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 12, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 76-77 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics in 2022, but the reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the university's management response; Douyin platform popularity did not enter the top 100, overall exposure is average, with no obvious signs of application heat; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not list this university separately, but the related China University of Mining and Technology has outstanding strengths in Safety Science and Engineering (A+), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology (A-), Civil Engineering (A-), etc., providing some support for related engineering majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Artificial Intelligence (cautious wait-and-see), and Business Administration (clearly discouraged) show clear differentiation in popularity; the total number of examinees in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, making it a cross-province application for Shanghai students; the substantial increase in the number of Shanghai examinees will generally raise the competition intensity for all universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 13876 in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan, and a significant increase of about 35% in the total number of Shanghai examinees, intensified competition is the main driving direction; the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be about 14176, with a range of 13676-14676.
